observations: Blocking triggered — SSE request intercepted by Etap
REGRESSION from v5/v7: URL redirected to perplexity.ai/? (not /search/blocked-*)
Toast: '이 스레드는 존재하지 않습니다' — same as v6 regression
v9 changes (answer field with text + message_mode=FULL + reconnectable=false) broke thread creation
The final event format is VERY sensitive — any deviation from v5 baseline causes thread invalidation
v5/v7 works: answer=null, no message_mode, no reconnectable fields in final event
v6/v8/v9 all break: adding extra fields or changing answer from null causes regression
CRITICAL INSIGHT: Perplexity validates final event structure strictly. Fields like message_mode, reconnectable, non-null answer are rejected

comparison.vs_015_v5: REGRESSION — v5 created valid thread with Thinking + empty answer
comparison.vs_016_v6: SAME regression pattern — thread creation broken
comparison.vs_018_v8: SAME regression pattern — thread creation broken

result.recommendation: v5/v7 is the ONLY working baseline. The answer=null in final event is REQUIRED. Focus next iteration on diff_block patch content format within the content event (event 5 in v5). Specifically: (1) try 'add' op instead of 'replace', (2) try different path structure for markdown_block content, (3) ensure chunks array has correct format with UUID matching.
